Grilled Pork Chops

author: Janet Caldwell

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield:

Ingredients

  • 3/4 cup soy sauce
  • 1/4 cup lemon juice
  • 1 tbsp chili sauce
  • 1 tbsp brown sugar
  • 1 clove garlic
  • 6 loin pork chops

Directions

  1. Combine first 5 ingredients.
  2. Place chops in Ziploc and pour marinade over.

  3. Refrigerate a few hours or overnight.

  4. Grill until done.
